form.title: ✨ Math Exercise Generator

apiKey.label: 🔑 API Key
apiKey.help: The key is only used for this generation and is not stored.

ollamaModel.label: 🦙 Ollama Model
ollamaModel.help: Requires ollama serve running on localhost:11434

howItWorks: Select a preset or manually configure digits and operations
Choose the format: grid (calculations), contextualized (stories) or both
For stories, choose an AI provider or use the built-in templates
Click Generate to open exercises in a new tab ready for printing

metadata.title: Math Exercise Generator
